rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CATHERINE L. FREEMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) Kathy Nakagawa, executor of the decedent's will to whom letters were issued in 2015, died in March 2022. The decedent's will did not name any alternate executor. The petitioner is a nominee of Nancy Miller, one of the three residual beneficiaries. The two other beneficiaries, Nancy Bass and Christina Bass, respectively having equal priority or collectively having higher priority for appointment under Probate Code section 8441(b), have not filed their consent to the petitioner's appointment. 2) The petitioner's attorney represented the deceased executor between September 2021 and March 2022 and was ordered by the Court to file a final account of the deceased executor's administration of this estate. It is unclear whether the attorney has obtained informed written consent required by CRPC 1.9 from the deceased executor (the attorney's former client)'s personal representative. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Joint Case Management Statement was not received by the assigned examiner until 10/26/22. Counsel should be mindful of the fact that, due to staff shortages, pleadings are not necessary actually e-filed on the day that they are uploaded for filing, and courtesy copies may not be directed to an examiner on the day they are dropped off. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOSEPH MUSCAT SEPARATE PROPERTY TRUST OF 2005
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine The Validity Of The February 25, 2019 Amendment And Restatement Of The Joseph Muscat Separate Property Trust Of 2005, For Accounting, And For Damages For Financial Elder Abuse Under The Welfare And Institution Code; For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Despite the hearing being continued 3 times and over 4 months passing since the initial hearing date, a proposed order still has not been provided (or a filed stamped copy of the petition) and notice still has not been given, as required in the tentative rulings. 2) Petitioner has not alleged the proper basis for venue. 3) Paragraph 12 of the petition does not list the names and addresses of the contingent beneficiaries under the 2019 restatement (Ginamarie Buckley and Marissa Anne Styles), who must be given proper notice. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
